name: search_and_replace
description: Automatically find and replace objects or elements within an image. Describe what to search for and what to replace it with, and the model will locate the matching element and generate a replacement that blends naturally with the surrounding image. No manual mask required - the model identifies the region automatically. The request must be sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The source image to edit (multipart form upload). Supported formats: png, jpeg, webp.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Text description of what to replace the found object with.

parameters.name: search_prompt
parameters.description: Text description of the object to find and replace in the image.

parameters.name: negative_prompt
parameters.description: Text describing what to avoid in the replacement.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for reproducible results (0 to 4294967294).

body.image: (binary image file - photo of a room with a red chair)
body.prompt: a sleek blue mid-century modern armchair

response_example.body: (binary image with the red chair replaced by a blue mid-century modern armchair)
